semantic.role: Infrastructure utility module providing low-level parsers for LLM response extraction and prompt context construction in the prompt subsystem.
responsibilities: Combine source content and optional context data into a single string for supporting context, conditionally based on file kind.
Parse generic markdown code blocks from an LLM response string, returning blocks filtered by requested languages.
Parse a structured JSON+Markdown response from an LLM into a JSON object, with fallback and cleanup for robustness.
Merge multiple optional `UsageInfo` objects into a single aggregated usage record, summing fields as appropriate.
outOfScope: Handling of non-markdown or non-JSON response formats.
LLM API calls or provider abstraction.
invariants: All exported functions are pure and side-effect free (no I/O, no logging beyond console.warn in parsing fallback).
The module depends only on `FileKind` from the protocol types layer, no infra or service dependencies.
Public surface should remain stable; callers should prefer this module over reimplementing parsing logic.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide reusable, testable parsing utilities to transform raw LLM text output into structured data (JSON, code blocks, usage stats) that downstream prompt builders and response handlers can consume reliably.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: fix: repair aggregator doc locale lookup and add JSON array parsing resilience (per git intent). The `parseStructuredResponse` likely received added resilience for JSON array parsing (handling arrays at top-level) to fix aggregator locale lookups.

publicSurface.description: Constructs a single string of supporting context by concatenating file content and optional context data, used when the file is a source file; otherwise returns content unchanged.
Extracts all markdown fenced code blocks from a full LLM response string and returns a map of language to block content, filtering to only include requested languages.
Parses a structured LLM response that contains both a JSON section (wrapped with ---JSON--- markers) and markdown sections, returning the parsed JSON object with fallback for malformed responses.
Merges multiple optional UsageInfo objects into a single aggregated object, summing numerical fields and combining symbolic values. Returns undefined if no usage data provided.

English.role: Infrastructure utility module providing low-level parsers for LLM response extraction and prompt context construction in the prompt subsystem.
responsibilities: Combine source content and optional context data into a single string for supporting context, conditionally based on file kind.
Parse generic markdown code blocks from an LLM response string, returning blocks filtered by requested languages.
Parse a structured JSON+Markdown response from an LLM into a JSON object, with fallback and cleanup for robustness.
Merge multiple optional `UsageInfo` objects into a single aggregated usage record, summing fields as appropriate.
outOfScope: Handling of non-markdown or non-JSON response formats.
LLM API calls or provider abstraction.

exports.name: buildSupportingContext
exports.signature:
buildSupportingContext(
  fileKind: FileKind,
  content: string,
  contextData?: string,
)

exports.name: parseStructuredResponse
exports.signature:
parseStructuredResponse(
  fullResponse: string,
  languages: string[],
  logContext: string,
)
